text:
1 A code indicating whether the patient has exhibited symptoms of delirium at time of admission. Delirium may be manifested as disoriented thinking, being easily distracted, disorganized speech, restlessness, lethargy, or altered perceptions or awareness of surroundings. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
68 _27A SWLWG_ADMSN_CD (27a) Swallowing Status: Admission CHAR 2 A code used to describe the patient's swallowing status at time of admission. 01 = Tube/Parenteral Feeding: tube/parenteral feeding used wholly or
